Open Source · MIT Licensed

DS0

The AI-Native Design System Framework

The zero layer. The foundation everything builds from.
Built for humans and AI equally.

Get StartedGitHub →
npx ds0 init

AI-Native

Every component includes machine-readable manifests and decision trees. AI tools understand DS0 natively.

Headless + Styled

Use headless primitives for full control, or grab styled components via CLI. Your choice.

Cross-Platform

React, React Native via NativeWind, and Web Components. One system, every platform.

Token-Driven

W3C DTCG design tokens cascade from core → semantic → theme → brand. Zero magic values.

Figma Synced

Tokens push to Figma Variables via REST API. Code Connect maps components 1:1. No paid plugins.

Copy-Paste CLI

Own your code. npx ds0 add button copies source into your project. Full control, zero lock-in.

MIT License · Built with ♥ by the DS0 community
